{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Source<br>Skills<br>Relic Resonance<br>Categories}}

{{CargoRelic
|name=Aztec Death God Figurine
|class_id=21292
|rank=AAA
|affct=FTH
|source=
|description=This is a symbolic representation of the Aztec death god Mictlantecuhtli. The figure is depicted as a blood-stained skeleton. This figurine holds significant meaning in Aztec religious beliefs, symbolizing death and the underworld, and reflecting the Aztec understanding of the cycle of life and death. This figurine deepens people's reverence for death and serves as an important bridge connecting the living and the dead, the earthly and the underworld, in rituals and festivals.
|fame=38
|art=49
|fth=73
|civ=34
|tech=49
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
